fields.weekly_recap:
Week 8 is in the books. riley took the week with 5.8 points, edging out derek who finished with 4.8. The league average was 3.1 points â€” if you're reading this hoping it was higher, it wasn't.

The week had 2 upsets worth noting: Philadelphia Eagles over San Francisco 49ers (2.0 pts on the table); Tampa Bay Buccaneers over Washington Commanders (1.8 pts on the table). Anyone who had San Francisco 49ers in that spot is probably still thinking about it. 

bot_ultron finished last this week with 0.0 points, which is 3.1 below average. The standings are always one good week away from a shakeup, so nobody's safe. New picks drop soon â€” don't blow it.

fields.message:
Hey everyone,

Welcome to PutnamBowl 2025 â€” Week 1 is officially live and picks are open.

This year we have 14 players competing across 17 weeks. Each week you'll pick winners against the spread for a slate of games. Points are weighted by difficulty, so the bigger the upset, the bigger the reward.

A few reminders before the season kicks off:

â€” Picks lock at the first kickoff of the week. If you miss the window, you get zero for that game â€” no exceptions.
â€” The leaderboard updates live as games are graded. Check back Sunday night.
â€” Streaks are tracked automatically. If you go 3+ weeks picking above 60%, you earn fire status.

New this year: the Analytics tab on the home page shows efficiency and variance charts across all players. Worth checking before you pick.

Good luck to everyone. May your Sundays be kind.

â€” Commissioner

fields.notes: 2024 Season â€” incredible finish, jake won it all on week 18!
